about.title: About the Festival
about.text_1: Art Labyrinth Summer Festival is an annual event founded in 2008 that has since become a significant landmark in Moldova’s cultural life. Each year we choose a new location to create a unique atmosphere and connect people through art and music.
about.text_2: We believe a festival is more than just a gathering of people. It is a space for transformation, exchange of ideas and inspiration. At Art Labyrinth, everyone can unlock their potential, become part of a community, contribute to a shared purpose and become a creator.
about.text_3: Our festival brings together diverse people — artists, musicians, craftspeople, volunteers, dreamers — everyone ready to work in unison and create.
about.theme_text_1: Pulse of the Earth is about the feeling that the earth has its own rhythm that is constantly present around us — in everyday life we barely notice it amid the noise, rush and endless tasks.
about.theme_text_2: This rhythm can be felt in simple things — in the movement of the wind, in the sounds of the forest, in the warmth of the earth beneath your feet, in the silence.
about.theme_text_3: When you give yourself time to stop, you gradually begin to catch this state — as if synchronising with something larger and alive. At the festival this feeling is amplified: through music, through movement, through the people around you, through moments lived here and now.
about.theme_text_4: Pulse of the Earth is about returning to this feeling, about connection with nature, with the surrounding space and with yourself — about the opportunity to slow down a little and feel your own rhythm.
features: Live music and performances by local and international artists
Ecological initiatives and life in harmony with nature
about.closing: Art Labyrinth is a space for creation, inspiration and self-expression. Join us, become part of a festival where every step is filled with mindfulness, every moment with harmony, and every person matters.

contribute.title: Contribute

description.auth: Here you can purchase tickets for the 2026 festival. Choose the ticket type, specify the quantity and place the order. After payment, you will receive the ticket by email.
